# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Google Compute Engine instances. Use default service account and default disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting instances running - we'll add custom encryption keys and security hardening in phase 2.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
- name: project_default
  type: cloud_projects.v1.project
  properties:
    id: '{{cloud_platform}}' # set the ID of your Google Cloud Platform Project in here, e.g., my-awesome-app or similar
  
# Compute Engine resources block starts from this line...
resources:
- name: instances
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: "us-central1" # set the desired location of your instance in here, e.g., us-west or similar for West Coast region and etc......
